---
title: "Welcome!"
---

Welcome to the *No more copy and paste! Parameterized plots and reports with R and Quarto* workshop! This workshop was organised as part of the [R/Medicine Conference](https://rconsortium.github.io/RMedicine_website/).

![](slides/images/rmedicine.png)

The workshop website can be found at [nrennie.rbind.io/r-medicine-2026-parameterized-reports](https://nrennie.rbind.io/r-medicine-2026-parameterized-reports), where you will also find a copy of the slides.

## Prerequisites

We'll be using the following R packages:

* dplyr
* gapminder
* ggplot2
* glue
* purrr
* plotly
* quarto
* tinytable

You'll also need to have [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) installed.
